message:
dashboard: remove duplicate doing line from agentIndicators (#35)

agentIndicators() was prepending its own doingHtml for outreach,
feature, and architect — causing the same text to appear twice when
those agents were working (once from liveSummary in renderAgents,
once from the indicators block). Status is owned by renderAgents;
the indicators function should only render metrics.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
